APPENDIX B (Cont.)

37 71 67 95 13 20 02 44 95 94 64 85 04 05 72 01 32 90 76 14 53 89 74 60 41
93 66 13 83 27 92 79 64 64 72 28 54 96 53 84 48 14 52 98 94 56 07 93 89 30
118 STATISTICS FOR ECONOMICS
Reprint 2026-27
WHAT THEY SAY
Statistics are no substitute for judgement.
Henry Clay Henry Clay Henry Clay Henry Clay Henry Clay
I abhor averages, I like the individual case. A man may have six meals one day and none the next, making an average of three meals per day, but that is not a good way to live.
Louis D. Brandies Louis D. Brandies Louis D. Brandies Louis D. Brandies Louis D. Brandies
The weather man is never wrong. Suppose he says that there’s an
80% chance of rain. If it rains, the 80% chance came up, if it doesn’t, the 20% chance come up.
Saul Barron Saul Barron Saul Barron Saul Barron Saul Barron
The death of one man is a tragedy. The death of millions is a statistic.
Joseph Stalin Joseph Stalin Joseph Stalin Joseph Stalin Joseph Stalin
When she told me I was average, she was just being mean.
Mike Beckman Mike Beckman Mike Beckman Mike Beckman Mike Beckman
Why is a physician held in much higher esteem than a statistician?
A physician makes an analysis of a complex illness whereas a statistician makes you ill with a complex analysis!
Gary C. Ramseyer Gary C. Ramseyer Gary C. Ramseyer Gary C. Ramseyer Gary C. Ramseyer
Reprint 2026-27
